name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, payment mismatches cause cash flow gaps. We automate invoice reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Difficulty in matching payments to open invoices
